strategy: The guide runs a four-player team: one Balance blader/support, a second blader of any school, and two hitters from different schools, funneling blades to the hitters.

Its opener is a Bladestorm chain — Round 1 Pet Bladestorm and Sharpened Blade Bladestorm; Round 2 Item/TC Bladestorm and Sharpened variants (a Violet Hood of Bitter Truth adds +25 to Bladestorm) — while the hitters prep Frenzy, Scarecrow, or Storm Lord.

Heed the guide's own caveat: the pure Bladestorm route is unreliable now, and because nearly every action you cast triggers an Oni counter (blades draw Putrefaction/Oni's Shadow, traps draw Naturalism/Righting the Scales, shields draw Oni's Forge, HoTs and DoTs also punish), keep setup minimal and coordinated.

Watch the Gambit warnings ('Your Doom is Imminent'). A filled gambit wipes all blades (Primal Oni), wards (Doom Oni), charms (Tribunal Oni), or HoTs (Infernal Oni) from the team, so land your hit before a gambit completes.
Kill War Oni single-target first, as the commenter notes — AoE on him makes him Pigsie-heal, and killing him with AoE fully heals him.
Funnel blades to a hitter in one round and burst Jade Oni with Death; heal through Plague on Round 3 and expect his Spirit Armor absorb on Round 5, so time the kill before then.
cheatNotes: On Round 5 Jade Oni shields himself with Spirit Armor, so plan your big hit before then or expect an absorb.
Trapping Jade Oni triggers Oni's Naturalism, so go easy on traps against him.
Multi-target spells like Windstorm count as trapping him and trigger it too.
A DoT on Jade Oni summons Camp Bandit, so avoid damage-over-time hits here.
This warns that Jade Oni is one step from his blade gambit.
When Jade Oni reaches four blades he casts Primal Oni and strips every blade from your team, so hit before he fills it.
Any blade you cast gets Putrefaction from Death Oni on the recipient, and Aegis will not save it.
Spells with secondary effects also count as blades for this cheat.
Multi-target blades trigger an AoE Putrefaction on the whole team.
Heal-over-time spells trigger Death Oni's Oni's Morbidity, so avoid HoT heals.
Death Oni shields himself toward a ward gambit whenever he shields.
At four shields Death Oni casts Doom Oni and removes all wards from your team.
Plague Oni casts Plague on Round 3, so expect an early accuracy and weakness debuff.
Blades also make Plague Oni cast Oni's Shadow, another reason to keep blades few.
Trapping makes Plague Oni cast Righting the Scales on you.
Multi-target spells trigger this too.
This warns that Plague Oni is building toward his charm-removal gambit.
When Plague Oni has two blades and you have two harmful charms he casts Tribunal Oni, wiping all charms from everyone.
Shielding makes War Oni cast Oni's Forge on the recipient, so limit shields.
Damaging War Oni with an AoE makes him Pigsie-heal, so hit him single-target instead.
Killing War Oni with an AoE fully heals him, so finish him with a single-target hit.
A HoT on War Oni builds his gambit, another reason to skip HoTs.
At two HoTs War Oni casts Infernal Oni and strips all HoTs from the team.
